category

Jordan

30 November 2024

UN DESA and ESCWA Organize Advanced Training in Jordan on Macro-Fiscal Modelling

Jordan receives first national training on the WEFM model for macroeconomic forecasting.

14 April 2024

UNDESA and ESCWA Collaborate to Implement WEFM Tool in Jordan and Tunisia

UN DESA and ESCWA are collaborating to support macroeconomic forecasting in Arab states using the WEFM model, with tailored efforts underway for Jordan and Tunisia.

© 2025 Economic Analysis and Policy Division (EAPD), Department of Economic and Social Affairs (DESA), United Nations — A project by UN DESA

This project is funded by the United Nations Peace and Development Trust Fund.
